mandatory_detection.rule: Only critical routes fail the health verdict. Optional absent routes are classified as ROUTE_NOT_REGISTERED.

summary.action: Serveur OK. Les 404 sont des modules optionnels non encore intégrés ou nommés autrement.

health.meaning: capacity health, not a proof of absolute power

json.note: relative local capacity index; not a benchmark standard and not a supercomputer claim

power.policy: multiply useful capacity by orchestration, not by fake claims

dict.role: native routing, classification, solver selection and guard system

ai_kernel.name: AI_KERNEL_CORE
ai_kernel.role: planner, router, critic-lite, corrector and result synthesizer

memory_l56.honesty: 8092MB/L56LE are logical profile layers; real allocation is measured and host-limited.

layer.name: HPC_SIMD
layer.honesty: JavaScript cannot force AVX2/AVX512 directly; Node/V8 may use CPU SIMD internally. Native AVX/BLAS are detected via OS/tools or optional native bindings. Results are measured locally only.

layer.name: CODEC_CPU
layer.honesty: This layer routes and detects real codecs. It does not claim a codec is executable unless the runtime, binary, library or API is detected.

layer.name: MEMORY_TERMS_CPU_SOLVER
layer.honesty: This layer compiles memory terms and detects what the host exposes. Prototype and supercomputer terms are vocabulary/routing unless real hardware or tools expose them.

NUMA_AWARENESS.target: prefer local memory when NUMA exists

actions: mark unavailable if no GPU tool
separate working memory and ledger memory

SUPERCOMPUTER_TERMS.target: route vocabulary without fake hardware claim
actions: map to local equivalent when possible

layer.name: CACHE_MEMORY_SOLVER
layer.honesty: This layer compiles cache memory terms and detects real exposed cache information. Solver/cache hit metrics are measured only if the route computes them.

actions: avoid random object graphs in hot loops
reuse hot arrays instead of reallocating

TTL_RUNTIME_CACHE.target: avoid stale data and useless recomputation
actions: use short TTL for live metrics
use longer TTL for static probes
never hide unavailable status behind cache

SOLVER_CACHE.target: memoize useful states without memory explosion
actions: separate hot working cache from audit ledger

AI_KV_CACHE.target: classify AI context cache without fake intelligence
actions: track token/context cache as software state

STORAGE_CACHE.target: separate memory cache from persistent storage

layer.name: STRATUM_SHA256_SOLVER
layer.honesty: This layer compiles Stratum/SHA256 terms and can measure local SHA256 throughput. It does not claim real mining, pool shares or revenue unless connected and verified by user-controlled endpoints.

actions: do not start mining from endpoint discovery
require explicit user control for real pool connection

HASHRATE_HONESTY.target: avoid fake hashrate and fake shares
actions: measure local SHA256 only when benchmark route is called
separate H/s benchmark from pool hashrate
do not claim accepted shares without pool response
do not estimate revenue as fact
parse JSON-RPC shape without sending credentials
DNS/TCP probe only if endpoint is explicitly supplied
no credential submission in probe mode

layer.name: PROCESSOR_CALC_TYPES_SOLVER
layer.honesty: This layer compiles processor calculation vocabulary and probes real local capabilities. Specialized accelerators are vocabulary unless detected.

actions: never infer accelerator power without detection
use WASM SIMD probe if available
do not claim AVX512 without flags
separate ASIC vocabulary from real hardware

SOLVER_ROUTING.target: route calculation type to best safe solver
actions: fallback to Node CPU when safe

field.name: LATENCY_MIN_FIELD
field.role: minimum latency transverse field across processor, memory, cache, network, IO, solver

CACHE: avoid stale cache hiding unavailable state
WORKERS: avoid worker startup per tiny task
avoid too many workers for memory-bound jobs
IO: prefer tmpfs for temporary latency tests

field.name: SHA256_SHA512_FIELD
field.role: processor field for SHA256 and SHA512 only

field.name: QN_QUANTUM_COPROCESSOR_FIELD
field.role: logical quantum-neural coprocessor field across memory/cache/solver/hash/latency

L1.name: L1_QN_CACHE
L1.role: ultra-hot working set for QN operations

L3.name: L3_SOLVER_GRAPH_CACHE
L3.role: solver states, graph blocks, DICT traversal

L4.name: L4_HASH_LATENCY_CACHE
L4.role: hash/KDF/latency probe reuse and digest workspace

L6_RAW.name: L6_RAW_EXPONENTIAL
L6_RAW.role: unbounded structural expansion descriptor, not physical infinite memory

L6_RAID.name: L6_SOFTWARE_RAID_CACHE
L6_RAID.role: aggregate L1..L6 cache shards with parity/checksum/ledger

ECC.name: 3D_VCACHE_ECC
ECC.role: detect/correct logical cache drift using checksum/parity/metadata

field.name: HARDWARE_DIE_3DNAND_PROCESSOR_FIELD
field.role: prepare die-layer topology for processor/coprocessor over 3D NAND style memory field

field.name: EXPONENTIAL_LOGIWARE_COPROCESSOR_V2
field.role: universal host-visible logiware ASIC coprocessor runtime

consciousness_core.honesty: interface metaphor only, not a claim of machine consciousness

json.real_capacity_note: measures current host only; not a supercomputer claim
